# Artwork Submission

For durable artwork submissions, prefer a pull request that adds a folder under:

```text
submissions/artwork/inbox/
```

## Summary

Describe the artwork.

## Intended Use

Mention item, NPC, spell, scenery, UI, or area use.

## Files

Attach or link files.

## License And Permission

State who made it and whether Spoiled Milk has permission to use it.

## AI Usage

State whether AI tools were used.
